view.description: Graphical view naming for Data Builder objects.

sql_view.description: SQL view naming for Gold Propagation layer only. Used for complex logic or performance optimization.
sql_view.note: SQL views should only be created in Gold Propagation layer (30_GP_*)

association.description: Associations are modelled inside Graphical Views (GV_) using CSN cds.Association elements. The host view follows the GV_ naming convention.
association.note: Association target must be a deployed view or local table in the same or shared space.

analytical_model.description: Analytical model naming for reporting and semantic consumption.

backup.description: Logical backup naming for copied objects before modification. Format: <object_name>_<timestamp>
